_comment: Harbor & Vine team. role -> server-authoritative RBAC scope. visible_tabs gates dashboard tab visibility. Mirror server scope client-side (never fetch more, always filter down).

users.name: Devin Okafor
users.scope_notes: Near-full. Sees commission TOTALS per agent (no split breakdowns). No payroll detail. Server strips split_pct from /api/commissions response for this role.

users.name: Carol Benitez
users.scope_notes: Commissions + QBO sync status only. No deal documents, no leads, no showings. /api/leads returns 403.

users.name: Priya Raman
users.scope_notes: Transaction Coordinator. Documents + Calendar + Pipeline. No Commissions tab. Can edit doc statuses; cannot edit commissions.

users.name: Jess Holloway
users.scope_notes: Agent. Server filters every list endpoint by agent_filter='Jess Holloway' for this role. Overview KPIs scoped to her book. Commissions tab hidden (no entry in visible_tabs).

users.name: Tomás Vidal
users.scope_notes: Agent. Server filters every list endpoint by agent_filter='Tomás Vidal' for this role. Overview KPIs scoped to his book. Commissions tab hidden.

_security_note: Client-build-grade (promoted 2026-06-16): auth.enabled=true. Each user carries password_hash + password_salt (sha256(salt + password)). The auth implementation lives in templates/backend/auth.py, mounted via flask_middleware(app) at server boot, gating every route except /login, /api/login, /logout, /brand.css, /static/*. Tokens are HMAC-SHA256-signed JWT-like payloads in the aios_token cookie. SANDBOX TEST CREDENTIALS were seeded by engine/init_passwords.py keyed by role: password_owner, password_president, password_accounting, password_tc, password_agent. Production builds run engine/init_passwords.py --interactive to prompt each user for a real password on first run (Sentinel rule 41 — no default password ships in production).
